title: Gagea pygmaea
taxonomy: Gagea pygmaea is classified within the family Liliaceae. It belongs to the genus Gagea, which comprises small, bulbous perennials. This genus is further divided into several species, each with unique characteristics. The Liliaceae family is a large group of flowering plants that include lilies, onions, and garlic. Gagea pygmaea is native to certain parts of Europe and Asia, adding to its specific classification.
